---
title: "Publications"
---

::: {.pub-note}
Publications associated to the urban soil research project, for a complete and updated list check the ORCID of each researcher.
:::

## 2026 

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-entry}
Acevedo, S. E.<sup><a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3203-2106"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/06/ORCID_iD.svg" width="12"></a></sup>, 
Alvarez-Torres, B.<sup><a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4208-0320"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/06/ORCID_iD.svg" width="12"></a></sup>, 
Séré, G.<sup><a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4310-6115"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/06/ORCID_iD.svg" width="12"></a></sup>, 
& Villaredt, M.<sup><a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0081-3170"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/06/ORCID_iD.svg" width="12"></a></sup> 
(2026). **Common challenges and potential approaches in urban soil physics research.** 
*Elementa: Science of the Anthropocene, 14*(1). 
[{{< fa link >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.1525/elementa.2025.00099){.pub-doi}
:::
:::
